allow: PowerShell($rw = Get-Command railway -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($rw\) { Write-Host "OK -> $\($rw.Source\)"; railway --version } else { Write-Host "No quedo en PATH de esta sesion. Bin global de npm:"; npm prefix -g; Write-Host "Probando ruta directa:"; & "$\(npm prefix -g\)\\railway.cmd" --version })
